data.body:
G3 container coverage audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child 2359 "Surface outbound sub-op telemetry + silent-no-op canary"), re-cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/822a/8937/fe57).

OWNED CRITERIA — FULLY covered by this child:
- Parent AC4 ("Sub-op telemetry (links/comments/labels applied) is surfaced, and a `computed > 0 && applied == 0` condition fails loudly") → 2359 AC1 (surfaces links_applied/comments_applied/labels_applied in batch outcome + RECON line = clause 1) + 2359 AC2 (test that computed>0 && applied==0 fails, reproducing the link drop = clause 2). FULLY.
- Parent SC3 ("A silent sub-op no-op … fails a test/canary instead of passing green") → 2359 AC2. FULLY.
- Contributes to AC7 (2359 AC3 sync semantics unchanged, suite green) and SC5 (2359 AC4 canary asserts count invariant, not log strings).

DELEGATION — criteria not owned correctly assigned to named siblings; declared OUT items (probe wiring → 822a; applier consolidation → 33d0) consistent with roster: AC1/AC2/SC1 → 8937 + fe57 + 59ef; AC3/SC2 → 33d0; AC5/SC4 → 822a. No per-criterion coverage gap attributable to child 2359 itself.

The single roster-level AC6 gap ("documented anti-change-detector guardrail GOVERNS new tests") is already tracked across siblings 33d0/59ef/822a/8937 and on this ticket; not re-filed to avoid duplication. No NEW coverage finding for this pairing — child 2359's owned criteria (AC4/SC3) are fully covered.
